payload.title: RemoteSyncAgent: continuous bidirectional sync to a hosted hub
payload.description: A long-running agent (generalize gossip.js from LAN-peer to remote-hub) that keeps a local .scope continuously converged with one hosted project: (a) PUSH on local change - subscribe to bus.on('change'), debounce ~50ms, push new events via syncWithRemote/uploadEvents with the API key + alias; (b) PULL via SSE - hold an open /events?project=<tenant> connection, and on each change/pointer notification do an incremental pull since the persisted cursor, append, replay (uses the incremental-replay story). One round at a time, error-isolated, cursor persisted in meta. Idempotent throughout so missed/duplicate events self-heal.
